zh.lifeSummary: 當William de Saye IV於1253年11月20日出生在英國肯特達哈姆時，他的父親Sir William de Say III44歲，母親Sibyl Marshal41歲。他於1277年與Elizabeth在英國艾可艾爾納姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1292年在英國坎布利其爾享年39歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de Saye IV于1253年11月20日出生在英国肯特達哈姆时，他的父亲Sir William de Say III44岁，母亲Sibyl Marshal41岁。他于1277年与Elizabeth在英国艾可艾爾納姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1292年在英国坎布利其爾享年39岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Saye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of Slovenian Saje: nickname for someone with very dark, sooty hair, derived from the root of sajast ‘sooty’, or directly from saja ‘soot’.
West African (Liberia): from the personal name Saye, found among the Mano (Mah) people, denoting a first-born boy.

variants.name: Say
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Sai in Orne or Say in Indre, France, perhaps so called from a Gaulish personal name Saius + the Latin locative suffix -acum (see also French name 3 below).

English: nickname, perhaps for someone who made or sold say, a type of woollen cloth, or for an habitual wearer of clothes made of this material, from Middle English sai(e) ‘say’ (Old French saie, from Latin saga, plural of sagum ‘military cloak’). See also Sayer .

French (southern): topographic name from saix (from Latin saxum) ‘rock’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word, for example, Say in Loire, Saix in Tarn and Vienne, Le Saix in Hautes-Alpes, or Les Saix in Isère.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When William de Saye IV was born on 20 November 1253, in Cudham, Kent, England, his father, Sir William de Say III, was 44 and his mother, Sibyl Marshal, was 41. He married Elizabeth in 1277, in Elsenham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1292, in Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 39.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de Saye IV est né le 20 novembre 1253, à Cudham, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Say III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Sibyl Marshal, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth en 1277, à Elsenham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1292, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de Saye IV am 20. November 1253 in Cudham, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Say III 44 und seine Mutter Sibyl Marshal 41. Er hat 1277 in Elsenham, Essex, England Elizabeth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1292 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Cambridgeshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de Saye IV è nato il il 20 novembre 1253 nel Cudham, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Say III, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Sibyl Marshal, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth nel 1277, nel Elsenham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1292, nel Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 39 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de Saye IVが1253年11月20日にイギリスケントクウドハムで生まれた時，父Sir William de Say IIIは44歳，母Sibyl Marshalは41歳であった。1277年にイギリスエセックスエルセンハムでElizabethと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1292年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアで39歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de Saye IV(이)가 1253년 11월 20일 영국 켄트 c드함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Say III(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Sibyl Marshal(은)는 41세였다. 그는 1277년 영국 에세스 엘센함에서 Elizabeth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1292년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 39세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de Saye IV nasceu em 20 de novembro de 1253, em Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Say III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Sibyl Marshal, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth em 1277, em Elsenham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1292, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 39 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de Saye IV родился 20 ноября 1253 г. в местности кудхам, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Say III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Marshal, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth в 1277 г. в местности элсенам, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1292 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 39 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de Saye IV nació el 20 de noviembre de 1253, en Cudham, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Say III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Sibyl Marshal, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Elizabeth en 1277, en Elsenham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1292, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años.
